text:
あれが、噂に聞く模倣体。
……アークスの精鋭、でしょうか。
やっかいなものですね。

幸い、ダーカーを倒しさえすれば
先へと進めそうです。模倣体と戦うかは
……貴方様に任せます。

It's those Replicas people have been talking
about... You're one of ARKS's finest, right?
Those things are going to be trouble.

Thankfully, it looks like we can keep going if
we defeat the Falspawn. As far as the
Replicas... I'll leave that fight to you.
